steps.title: Identify the defining claim
steps.content: ”Seals had never been seen spitting before”—the passage explicitly marks this as unprecedented behavior.

steps.title: Match the claim to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly captures this: the main topic is a previously unseen behavior of gray seals. The other three choices either focus on incidental details or misrepresent what the passage emphasizes. That matches choice B — B is correct.
